name: Kasett Rewind
description: Thread-aware compaction provider with hot-swap stubs — zero-delay compaction that keeps your agent oriented across context boundaries.

enabled.description: Master switch — when false, plugin is completely inert

compaction.description: Settings for the compaction provider and rolling window

model.description: Model to use for compaction LLM calls. Use "default" (or omit) to inherit the agent's primary model from environment variables. Set to a model identifier string (e.g. "claude-haiku-3-5-20241022" or "anthropic/claude-haiku-3-5") to pin a specific model.

hotSwap.description: Enable hot-swap compaction. When true, summarize() returns a stub immediately (zero LLM delay) and the full summary is swapped in between turns via an atomic JSONL rewrite. The user sees no compaction delay.

hotSwapTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time (ms) the background hot-swap worker will wait for the session write lock to clear before giving up. The stub remains in place if this timeout is exceeded.

windowSize.description: Number of previous compaction thread metas to evaluate

weights.description: Weight per compaction slot, most recent first. Length must equal windowSize.

steering.description: Settings for the per-turn orientation/steering hook

threadTracking.description: Enable thread meta tracking and injection into every agent turn

coldStart.description: Cold-start / session-rollover bridge. When a new session is created for a sessionKey that has prior session JSONLs on disk but no compaction summaries to inherit from, this branch generates a one-shot rollover summary from the prior session's raw turns.

enabled.description: Master switch. When false, the cold-start path is completely inert.

minTurns.description: If the current session has more than this many user/assistant turns, it isn't 'cold' and the rollover path is skipped.

maxIdleHours.description: Sibling sessions older than this (mtime delta) are considered stale and skipped. Default 7 days.

hotSwap.description: When true, first turn gets a cheap synchronous stub; the rich summary is generated in the background and picked up on subsequent turns.

hotSwapTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time (ms) the background worker will wait before giving up.

maxSourceTurns.description: Maximum number of turns from the sibling session that feed the rollover summary LLM call. Capped from the tail (most-recent N).
